# Hmziq Blog

> Writing about software engineering, tools, and ideas.

## Posts

- [Vibe Coding My Blog in Astro, Deployed on Cloudflare](/posts/vibe-coding-astro-cloudflare): Third attempt at a blog. Finally got this one built.

## Pages

- [About](/about): 9 years building software. Full-stack engineer.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for freelance, contract, or full-time software work.
- [Newsletter](/newsletter): Subscribe for updates when new posts are published.
- [Tags](/tags): Browse posts by tag.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse posts by category.
- [Changelog](/changelog): Site version history.

## Info

- Author: hmziqrs
- Site: https://blog.hmziq.rs
- Built with: Astro 6, Tailwind v4, DaisyUI 5
- Deployed on: Cloudflare Pages
